name: catch
description: Player catches falling/incoming objects to score; missed objects penalise.
core_loop: Move horizontally to intercept descending items; build a streak for bonus.

name: dodge
description: Player avoids incoming threats while moving toward a goal.
core_loop: Read incoming trajectories; thread through gaps; survive long enough to escalate.

name: rhythm
description: Player times button presses to incoming visual or audio beats.
core_loop: Hit the strike window on each beat; missing breaks the combo; speeds up over time.

name: matching
description: Player pairs or aligns objects by colour/shape/sound.
core_loop: Spot the pair before the row scrolls offscreen; chain matches for multiplier.

name: stacking
description: Player drops blocks/objects to build the tallest stable structure.
core_loop: Time the drop on a swinging crane; misaligned stacks shrink; tower wobbles harder as it grows.

name: tracing
description: Player follows a path on screen without crossing boundaries.
core_loop: Hold the line through curves and pinch-points; speed required rises with each lap.

name: memorize
description: Player observes a sequence then repeats it from memory.
core_loop: Watch the flash sequence; replay it back; sequence grows by one each round.

name: herding
description: Player guides multiple semi-autonomous entities into a goal zone.
core_loop: Sweep flock toward the pen; strays multiply if ignored; timer per wave.

name: balancing
description: Player keeps a wobbling object/character centred as conditions change.
core_loop: Counter-steer against shifting tilt; gusts intensify; survive set duration per round.

name: sorting
description: Player categorises incoming objects into correct bins before they pile up.
core_loop: Identify category fast; throw to correct bin; misfires raise the spawn rate.

name: chase
description: Player actively pursues a moving target that evades; closing distance is the win condition.
core_loop: Predict the target's next juke; tag-distance shrinks the timer; target speeds up between rounds.

name: whack
description: Targets briefly surface at random positions; player taps them before they retreat.
core_loop: React to spawn locations; reveal window narrows each wave; combo bonus for back-to-back hits.

name: rotation
description: Player rotates the playfield, a grid, or a piece to align falling/incoming elements.
core_loop: Anticipate where the next piece needs to land; pre-rotate before it locks in; speeds up.

name: drawing
description: Player traces shapes or glyphs the screen demands within a time budget.
core_loop: Reproduce the shown glyph quickly and accurately; harder glyphs each round; timer shrinks.

name: charge_release
description: Player holds to charge power then releases for a precision shot; hold too long and the charge overflows.
core_loop: Read the target distance; release at the right charge band; band narrows as the round progresses.

name: routing
description: Player lays or rotates path segments so a flow reaches the goal before it overflows.
core_loop: Build the path under flow pressure; branching demands appear; overflow loses lives.

name: echo
description: Player listens to/watches a pattern and reproduces it on a fretboard / pad / grid.
core_loop: Mimic the call exactly; one wrong cell = strike; patterns grow in length and tempo.

name: deflect
description: Player aims a bouncer to send incoming objects back at sources or into goal zones.
core_loop: Aim deflection direction; chain ricochets for multipliers; missed objects drain shield.
